reasoning: The user requested a 'fun colorful scheme' while maintaining a 'radio station vibe' with the tagline 'Proud. Loud. Local.' Radio stations and music apps historically translate 'loud and fun' to a dark UI with extremely vibrant, high-energy neon colors (reminiscent of DJ booths, stage lighting, and soundwaves).

brand.name: The Beat 515
brand.vibe: High-Energy, Fun, Colorful, Loud, Local, Musical

rules: Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for large backgrounds, only for text and high-contrast icons.
The primary pink (#FF007F) is reserved for Play buttons, Request CTAs, and active states.
Use cyan (#00F0FF) for secondary actions like 'Read More' in news or secondary tabs.
Use yellow (#FFF000) strictly for 'LIVE' badges or urgent notifications.
Always set hover states to a lighter hue with explicit text color.
H1 (Hero): text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase.
H2 (Section): text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight.
Overlines/Labels: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#00F0FF].
Do not use Inter for any headings.
Containers with borders MUST have p-6 or p-8 internal padding.
Use optical alignment for icons + text.
Images must be capped at max-h-[80vh] on mobile to prevent scrolling fatigue.

header_nav.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm

radio_player_bar.classes: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-zinc-950/80 border-t border-[#FF007F]/30 backdrop-saturate-150

dashboard_cards.classes: bg-[#18181b] rounded-2xl border border-white/5 hover:border-[#00F0FF]/30 transition-colors shadow-lg

components.buttons: Rounded-full for main CTAs (Play, Request). Sharp slight-radius (rounded-md) for dashboard actions. Primary CTAs use glowing shadow drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(255,0,127,0.5)].
components.request_chat: Combined form and chat UI. Use Shadcn Form for the submission part, and a custom scrollable chat feed (flex-col-reverse) for the live requests. Message bubbles should be rounded-2xl bg-zinc-800 text-sm.
components.news_feed: Bento grid mode. Hero article spans 2 columns, others are 1 column. Images must have bg-black/40 max overlay.
components.live_badge: A pulsating dot indicator (animate-pulse) next to 'ON AIR' or 'LIVE' text. Colored #FFF000 (Yellow) or #FF007F (Pink).

motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale up slightly (hover:-translate-y-1 hover:scale-[1.02]) for cards and images.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use a slow-moving marquee (react-fast-marquee) for 'Now Playing: [Song Title] - [Artist]' in the player bar.

rules: NEVER use placeholder images like via.placeholder.com. ONLY use the provided URLs.

hero_background_abstract.description: Vibrant abstract neon soundwave on dark background
hero_background_abstract.usage: Hero section background, auth screen background

live_dj_booth_1.description: Cinematic high-end modern DJ booth with neon lighting
live_dj_booth_1.usage: About Us or DJ Profiles header image

live_dj_booth_2.description: DJ mixing music on turntable with laptop
live_dj_booth_2.usage: Showcase image for the 'On-Air Talent' section

news_desk.usage: Hero image for the News Articles Feed

music_festival.description: Live concert festival crowd with neon lights
music_festival.usage: Background image for Local Events or Community page

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required font families (Outfit for headings, Manrope for body, JetBrains Mono for overlines/labels) via Google Fonts or standard imports.
Use react-fast-marquee for the 'Now Playing' scrolling text in the bottom radio player bar.

The layout must prioritize a mobile-app feel, as this is originally intended for the App Store (even though it's built with React JS + Tailwind here). This means a persistent bottom navigation or player bar is crucial for small screens.
Implement Role-Based dashboards using Shadcn 'Tabs' to switch between Admin, DJ, News Editor, and Listener views if mocked locally, or separate routes.
Ensure all buttons, form inputs, and key UI components have valid, kebab-case 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'play-radio-button', 'submit-request-button').
Use Shadcn UI primarily for the interactive elements (Forms, Dropdowns, Dialogs, Tabs) but style them with the dark neon theme colors provided above.
Do not use generic gray borders; tint them with the background color or use white/10 for subtlety.
